title: Cricket Control New Brunswick, NJ | Professional Extermination $350-$550
metaDescription: Expert cricket control in New Brunswick, NJ. Serving Rutgers campus, downtown, and residential areas. Professional cricket extermination $350-$550. Call today!
intro: New Brunswick residents dealing with chirping crickets don't have to lose sleep anymore. Our professional cricket control services protect homes and businesses throughout the Hub City, from the historic streets near Rutgers University to the residential neighborhoods along the Raritan River. We provide fast, effective cricket extermination with pricing between $350 and $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience to New Brunswick, combining advanced cricket elimination techniques with local expertise. Our licensed technicians understand the unique pest challenges in Middlesex County and provide guaranteed results with environmentally responsible treatments.
localContext: New Brunswick's mix of historic Victorian homes, modern Rutgers student housing, and waterfront properties along the Raritan River creates ideal conditions for cricket infestations, especially in basements and around foundations. The city's dense urban core near George Street and Albany Street corridor, combined with moisture from the river, makes year-round cricket monitoring essential for property owners.

faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in New Brunswick homes?
faqs.answer: New Brunswick's proximity to the Raritan River creates moisture-rich conditions that attract crickets, particularly in older homes near Rutgers campus and downtown. Crickets seek shelter indoors during cooler months, and the city's mix of aged and new construction provides numerous entry points through foundation cracks and gaps.

faqs.question: What's included in your $350-$550 cricket control service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive cricket control includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment of cricket populations, exterior perimeter protection, and exclusion recommendations. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and whether follow-up treatments are needed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations show significant reduction within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. We offer same-day or next-day service throughout New Brunswick, including the Rutgers campus area, French Street neighborhood, and surrounding residential districts.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial properties near Rutgers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide cricket control for all property types in New Brunswick, including single-family homes, student apartments, university buildings, restaurants along George Street, and commercial spaces downtown. We customize our treatment approach based on your property's specific needs and occupancy requirements.
